## Summary

Describe the problem and the change.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] Type checks pass
- [ ] Build passes
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Risk Review

- [ ] No secrets or personal data included
- [ ] Security impact considered
- [ ] Privacy impact considered
- [ ] Economic/ledger impact considered
- [ ] Protocol compatibility considered
- [ ] Dataset/model licensing considered

## DCO

- [ ] All commits are signed off with `Signed-off-by`
